title: Emergency Access
previewError: This emergency access link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
intro: Hi {contactName}, you were designated as an emergency contact on {ownerName}'s Monize account.
introDetail: Setting a password here will sign you in as the account holder and give you full access to the account. Existing sessions are revoked and the previous credentials are replaced.

toasts.success: You now have access to {name}'s account.
toasts.failed: Failed to complete emergency access claim. The link may have expired or already been used.
